metadata.file_name: Cyndi Lauper - Change of Heart (12 Extended Club Remix).flac
metadata.title: Change of Heart (12" Extended Club Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:25.72] Here I am just like I said I would be
[00:33.87] I'm your friend just like you think it should be
[00:41.19] Did you think I would stand here and lie
[00:45.00] While our moment was passing us by?
[00:48.71] Oh I am here
[00:52.12] Waiting for your change of heart
[00:55.02] It just takes a beat to turn it around
[00:59.40] Yes, I'm waiting for your change of heart
[01:03.19] At the edge of my seat, please turn it around
[01:16.06] Days go by leaving me with a hunger
[01:23.96] I could fly back to when we were younger
[01:31.04] When adventures like cars we would ride
[01:34.91] And the years lied ahead still untried
[01:39.67] While I stand here
[01:41.61] Waiting for your change of heart
[01:45.82] It just takes a beat to turn it around
[01:49.54] Yes, I'm waiting for your change of heart
[01:53.44] At the edge of my seat, please turn it around
[02:26.11] Blind leading blind, never feel the laughter
[02:33.95] Search through time, nothing reveals the answer
[02:41.08] If it's truth that you're looking to find
[02:45.23] It is nowhere outside of your mind
[02:49.06] I bide my time
[02:51.95] Waiting for your change of heart
[02:55.69] It just takes a beat to turn it around
[02:59.52] Yes, I'm waiting for your change of heart
[03:03.76] At the edge of my seat, please turn it around
[03:07.67] Yes, I'm waiting for your change of heart
[03:11.85] It just takes a beat to turn it around
[03:15.26] Yes, I'm waiting for your change of heart
[03:19.30] At the edge of my seat, please turn it around
[03:40.57] And I'm waiting for your change of heart
[03:50.23] Waiting for your change of heart
[03:59.10]
